Appearances:
Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership is present. Represented by Charles Byrd.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ama Andam is present.
Attorney Marilyn Underwood representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 525, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
